auth: API key REQUIRED — Authorization: Bearer <key>; unauthed (no license.key) → 401 {ok:false, code:'auth_required'}
formatter: src/lib/venue-public-formatter.ts :: formatShadowVenuePublic (exported, pure, allow-list by construction)
error_contract: 401 {ok:false, code:'auth_required', error, suggested_action} unauthed; 500 {error} on stats failure
consumers: authed API-key holders (operator runbook RUNBOOK-VENUE-SHADOW-ONBOARDING.md). NO public/landing consumer (Step-0 census: 0).
drift_check_command: curl -s -H "Authorization: Bearer $ALGOVAULT_API_KEY" https://api.algovault.com/api/performance-shadow | jq '.venues[0] | keys' && echo '--- forbidden must be absent ---' && curl -s -H "Authorization: Bearer $ALGOVAULT_API_KEY" https://api.algovault.com/api/performance-shadow | jq '[.venues[] | (.min_buy_sell_sample, .last_eval_at, .last_eval_pfe_wr, .last_eval_buy_sell_count)] | map(select(. != null)) | length'  # expect 0
